user_request:
I want to create a table tracking AI companies that are actively hiring.

Columns needed:
- Company Name
- Website
- Is hiring for AI roles? (yes/no)
- Team size (approximate)
- Recent funding (last round)

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.
Make sure to include both established companies and startups.

columns.name: Company Name
columns.description: Official name of the AI company or organization

columns.name: Website
columns.description: Official company website URL where company information and careers page can be accessed

columns.name: Is Hiring for AI Roles?
columns.description: Confirmed status of whether the company is actively recruiting for AI-related positions (research, machine learning engineering, data science, AI product roles, etc.). Must be verified through current job postings or careers page.
columns.validation_strategy: Check company careers page or LinkedIn jobs for active AI-related postings. Search for roles with titles containing 'AI', 'Machine Learning', 'Data Science', 'ML Engineer', 'AI Researcher', or similar. Verify postings are dated within the last 30 days to confirm active hiring.

columns.name: Team Size (Approximate)
columns.description: Estimated total number of employees at the company. Provide range (e.g., '50-100', '1000+') or specific number if available. Distinguish between startups (<50), growth stage (50-500), and established companies (500+).
columns.validation_strategy: Extract from company LinkedIn profile 'About' section, Crunchbase company profile, or official company website. If exact number unavailable, use LinkedIn employee count ranges or recent funding announcements that indicate scale. Document source of estimate.

columns.name: Recent Funding (Last Round)
columns.description: Most recent funding round information including round type (Seed, Series A/B/C, etc.), amount raised, date of funding, and lead investors if available. Include 'Bootstrapped' or 'Profitable' if company is not venture-funded.
columns.validation_strategy: Search Crunchbase, PitchBook, or company press releases for most recent funding announcement. Verify funding date is within last 24 months. Include round designation and amount in USD. If no recent funding found, check company website for profitability status or bootstrapped status. Document source and date of information.

columns.name: AI Sector Focus
columns.description: Primary sector or domain where the company applies AI technology. Examples: 'Research & Development', 'Healthcare/Medical AI', 'Enterprise Software', 'Autonomous Systems', 'Natural Language Processing', 'Computer Vision', 'Robotics', 'Financial Services', etc.
columns.validation_strategy: Review company mission statement, product descriptions, and job postings to identify primary AI application area. Check company website 'About' or 'Solutions' pages. Categorize into one primary sector based on majority of company focus and hiring activity.

columns.name: Company Stage
columns.description: Classification of company maturity: 'Startup' (pre-Series A or early stage), 'Growth Stage' (Series A-C), or 'Established' (Series D+, public, or well-known enterprise). Use funding history and team size as indicators.
columns.validation_strategy: Determine based on funding round, team size, and market presence. Startups typically have <50 employees and pre-Series A funding. Growth stage companies have Series A-C funding and 50-500 employees. Established companies are Series D+, public, or have 500+ employees with significant market presence.

search_strategy.description: Identify AI companies actively hiring across research, healthcare, and enterprise sectors, including both established organizations and startups with recent funding activity

subdomains.name: AI Research & Foundation Models
subdomains.focus: Companies focused on AI research, large language models, foundation models, and core AI technology development
search_queries: AI research companies hiring 2025 machine learning engineers
large language model companies recruiting AI researchers
foundation model startups hiring positions
AI safety and alignment research organizations hiring

subdomains.name: Healthcare & Medical AI
subdomains.focus: Companies applying AI to healthcare, medical imaging, drug discovery, clinical diagnostics, and healthcare operations
search_queries: healthcare AI companies hiring machine learning engineers 2025
medical imaging AI startups recruiting
biotech AI companies job openings
clinical decision support AI platforms hiring

subdomains.name: Enterprise AI & Software
subdomains.focus: Established and growth-stage companies building AI-powered enterprise software, business intelligence, and productivity tools
search_queries: enterprise AI software companies hiring 2025
business intelligence AI platforms recruiting
enterprise SaaS companies with AI hiring
productivity AI tools companies job openings

subdomains.name: AI Infrastructure & Platforms
subdomains.focus: Companies building AI infrastructure, MLOps platforms, data platforms, and tools for AI development and deployment
search_queries: AI infrastructure companies hiring machine learning engineers
MLOps platform startups recruiting 2025
data platform companies with AI hiring
AI development tools companies job openings

subdomains.name: Autonomous Systems & Robotics
subdomains.focus: Companies developing autonomous vehicles, robotics, autonomous systems, and embodied AI applications
search_queries: autonomous vehicle companies hiring AI engineers 2025
robotics AI startups recruiting
autonomous systems companies job openings
embodied AI robotics platforms hiring

Columns needed:

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.

search_strategy.table_purpose: Identify AI companies actively hiring across research, healthcare, and enterprise sectors, including both established organizations and startups with recent funding activity

final_rows.match_rationale: OpenAI is a leading AI research company focused on foundation models and large language models, actively hiring for research and engineering roles in 2025.
DeepMind, now merged with Google Brain, is a top AI research lab focused on foundation models and advanced AI, with aggressive hiring for research and engineering roles.
Meta AI is a major player in AI research and foundation models, actively recruiting for research, engineering, and product roles in 2025.
Microsoft Research AI is a leading research division focused on foundation models and core AI, with ongoing hiring for research and engineering positions.
Anthropic is a prominent AI safety and research company developing large language models, with active hiring for research and engineering roles.
Hippocratic AI is actively hiring across various departments and has recently secured significant funding to expand its AI healthcare agents.
Navina is focused on innovating primary care with AI and is actively hiring to support its mission.
RapidAI offers healthcare technology jobs focused on improving clinical decision-making and care quality.
PathAI is a leading company in AI for digital pathology, though specific hiring information is not detailed.
K Health provides AI-driven virtual primary care but lacks explicit hiring information.
